88+ locksmiths enquiries captured this week

AI Call Handling for Locksmiths UK — 24/7 Lockout Help

Emergency lockouts, key replacements, security upgrades. When a customer is locked out at midnight or a tenant has lost their keys, every second counts. Katie answers every call instantly, qualifies the job, and sends you the details before you even pick up.Installed in 30 minutes. No credit card required.

Demand for locksmiths is at an all-time high
No credit card required
Cancel anytime
Live in 30 minutes

Why Locksmiths Choose Whoza

Katie answers every lockout call in under 3 seconds — even at midnight on a bank holiday

She identifies emergency vs. routine, residential vs. commercial, and security upgrade vs. lockout

You get a full job brief: 'Emergency lockout — 2-bed flat — SW11 — no keys — urgent — 2:14am'

Landlord and commercial enquiries tagged for priority follow-up — these are your repeat revenue

Average missed call value78%

The Complete Revenue System

From Missed Call to 5-Star Review

Fully automated. Always running. More work every week.

Phase 1: Capture
Call Comes In
Missed or after hours
AI Answers
Your chosen voice takes detailed notes 24/7
Job Qualified
Urgency-flagged. Time-wasters filtered. Emergencies prioritised.
AI Call Notes
Every conversation captured as text
Spam Filtered
Sales calls blocked automatically
Phase 2: Deliver
Sent to Phone
Detailed notes via WhatsApp or SMS
You Accept
One tap to confirm. Auto-synced to your calendar (Growth+).
Enquiry Captured
Searchable dashboard + exportable logs.
Keep Your Number
Your customers never know anything changed
Phase 3: Convert
Job Completed
You do the work
Review Requested
Claire auto-follows up. Google reviews on autopilot.
Phase 4: Grow
Rex Analyses
Monthly competitor check
Growth+ Actions
Weekly recommendations
More Calls

How Whoza Works

From missed call to captured enquiry — automatically.

01

We Set Up Whoza on Your Number

Forward your number to Whoza. Live and answering calls in 30 minutes. No tech skills, no engineers, no downtime.

30 min
02

We Answer Your Calls

Katie or Mark answers every call, qualifies the enquiry, and sends it to your phone.

24/7
03

You Accept Jobs and Get Paid

Real enquiries land on your phone. Tap to accept, call back or decline. Enquiry captured.

Instant
04

Only Continue If It's Working

See real results first. No upfront cost. Cancel anytime if it's not right for you.

No commitment

No website? No problem.

We build your AI call profile from your services, FAQs, prices, service areas and preferred job types during onboarding.

We only make money, when you make money

See how AI call handling works for your trade.

No credit card required. Cancel anytime.

Your AI Revenue Team

Meet Katie, Mark, Claire & Rex

Four AI specialists working together to answer calls, capture enquiries, collect reviews and show you what to improve next.

Call Capture

Katie

Female VoiceCustomisable

Katie answers calls 24/7, qualifies real customer enquiries, and sends them to WhatsApp while you work. Friendly, professional and calm under pressure - she helps customers feel heard before the enquiry reaches you.

Sample greeting:

"Hi, you've reached Thompson Plumbing. My name is Katie. How can I help you today?"

Ready to accept, call back or decline.

Call Capture

Mark

Male VoiceCustomisable

Mark answers calls 24/7, qualifies real customer enquiries, and sends them to WhatsApp while you work. Clear, efficient and professional - ideal if you prefer a direct male voice.

Sample greeting:

"Hi, you've reached Wilson Electrics. This is Mark speaking. What can I do for you?"

Job type, urgency, location and customer details captured.

Review Collection

Claire

Claire turns completed jobs into reviews

Claire follows up after completed work to request reviews while the customer still remembers the good service. Polite, timely and consistent - she helps turn good jobs into future trust.

Hi John, thanks for choosing Thompson Plumbing yesterday. If you were happy with the service, would you mind leaving us a quick review? It really helps. [Google review link]

More reviews. More trust. More customers choosing you.

Included in Growth plan and above.

Competitor Insights

Rex

Rex shows what to fix next

Rex checks your competitors, reviews and AI visibility, then turns the data into simple actions you can use each week.

Your nearest competitor has 41 reviews. You have 32. Action this week: request 5 more reviews from recent customers and reply to your last 3 Google reviews.

Clear weekly actions to improve visibility and help AI search recommend your business.

Monthly competitor analysis on every plan. Weekly actions from Growth upwards.

Choose the voice and name that fits your business. Switch anytime.

Full Control

You Stay In Control

Every job comes to you first. You decide which ones to take.Choose how your calls are answered — tone, questions and job types.

Accept or decline every enquiry instantly
Request callback before deciding
Adjust booking time if needed
See full job details before accepting

You Never Miss a Job

WhatsApp, SMS or email — your choice.

WhatsApp
SMS
Email

Jobs always reach you, even if one channel fails.

Instant

Claire — Every Job Becomes Your Next Review

Every Completed Job Becomes Your Next Review — And Your Next Customer

Claire automatically turns completed work into 5-star Google reviews, helping more customers choose you.Post-job review capture that builds trust and brings future work.

Automatic WhatsApp follow-up after every completed job
Smart timing — reaches out when customer satisfaction is highest
Handle issues privately before they become public feedback
Track how reviews translate into more calls
Included in Growth plan and above

Automatic post-job conversion after every completed job.

This Week's AI Recommendation
From Rex — Your Growth Advisor
You're not appearing in AI recommendations for your area
→ Issue: Profile data missing key signals
Competitor X has more reviews and stronger profile data
→ Action: Improve review count + get more jobs
You need 5 more reviews to outrank competitors this week
→ Result: Get found, more calls, more jobs
Top recommendation: Add 3 more jobs to your portfolio
→ Result: Stronger AI recommendations in 7 days
The Result
More visibility → more calls → more captured enquiries
Delivered every Monday
Rex — Your Growth Advisor

Get More Work Every Week — Without Ads

When customers ask ChatGPT or Google AI for a tradesperson, Rex helps make sure your business is the one recommended.Rex tells you what to fix this week so you get more calls and more jobs.

Monthly competitor analysis on every plan
Weekly AI visibility actions from Growth upwards
Advanced Rex reporting on Pro and Scale
Multi-location intelligence on Scale

30-day money-back guarantee on all plans.

Upgrade anytime as your business grows.

Starter

Capture + deliver jobs

£59/month
£4.50/job• 8 jobs included
Includes 100 call handling minutes/month
7-day free trial
  • AI call handling 24/7
  • AI call notes + searchable transcripts
  • Urgent call flags (RED/AMBER/GREEN)
  • 12 AI voice options (UK accents)
  • Post-call email summary
  • Voicemail detection + auto-forward
  • Spam call filtering
  • Lead capture + dashboard
  • Booking automation
  • WhatsApp job delivery
  • Keep your existing business number
  • No contract — cancel anytime
  • Monthly competitor analysis
  • 8 booked enquiries included

Full revenue system

£125/month
£3.25/job• 16 jobs included
Includes 300 call handling minutes/month
  • Everything in Starter
  • 16 booked enquiries included
  • Downloadable call logs (CSV/Excel)
  • Weekly summary email (Monday 8am)
  • Zapier / Make integration
  • Customisable WhatsApp message templates
  • Out-of-hours auto-tagging

  • Monthly competitor analysis
  • Weekly actionable AI visibility insights
  • Calendar sync (Google, Outlook, Apple)

£230/month
£2.75/job• 40 jobs included

  • Smart scheduling (checks calendar before booking)

  • Outbound callback campaigns
  • CRM integration (Jobber, ServiceTitan)
  • connects to your existing tools
  • £2.75 per additional booked enquiry

Scale

£399/month
£2.25/job• 100 jobs included
Includes 1,500 call handling minutes/month

Pricing shown is for our full launch. Pilot users will lock in introductory rates. Join the pilot to secure your price.

Need more call time? Add 100-minute bundles for £20, or pay £0.26/min for additional usage. These minutes never expire.

Optional Upgrades

Flexible add-ons to support your business as you grow.

100 Minute Bundle

Extra call handling minutes at a discounted rate.

£20
Lower cost than standard overage rate (£0.26/min)

Done-for-you AI & Automation Support

Extra help setting up your AI assistant, call flows and business automations.

£200 per hour
Ideal for scaling businesses and advanced optimisation

What happens after you sign up?

Live in less than 30 minutes. Here's how.

Step 1

Choose your AI assistant

Pick Katie, Mark, or choose any male or female assistant name you prefer.

Step 2

Select your voice and add your business details

Choose a male or female voice from the dropdown, then add your services, service area, hours, FAQs and preferred job types.

Step 3

We build your AI call profile and business knowledge base

Whoza creates the information your assistant uses to answer calls, qualify enquiries and route details correctly.

Step 4

You approve a test call

Listen to how your assistant handles a real-style customer enquiry and request edits if needed.

Step 5

Your Whoza agent goes live on your number

Once approved, your AI assistant starts answering calls and sending qualified enquiries straight to your phone.

Simple pricing that scales with your business. Most customers cover their cost in their first few jobs. Only continue if it's working for you.

Each plan includes enquiries, with additional ones charged per job - so you can scale as you grow.

Start small. Only pay more as you get more work.

Additional call handling minutes are charged at £0.26 per minute across all plans. You can monitor and control usage at any time.

Questions Locksmiths Ask About AI Call Handling

Direct answers to the questions your customers are searching for right now

Whoza starts at £59/month for the Starter plan. That's less than one emergency lockout callout. Most locksmiths recover the cost within a week by capturing just one missed midnight lockout. Every plan includes unlimited AI calls, WhatsApp alerts, and 7-day free trial.
